title: LabVIEW shortcut
description: LabVIEW shortcut documents shortcut material for LabVIEW in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 창 나누기: Ctrl + T, 기본 도움말: Ctrl + H, Text 크기 변경: Ctrl + +/-, 블록다이어그램 정리: Ctrl + U, and 깨진 와이어 정리: Ctrl + B, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include shortcut, labview shortcut, and language, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / labview / shortcut / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
